authority_stack.title: National Archives: Herb Morrison eyewitness recording
Smithsonian National Postal Museum: Hindenburg Disaster

supported_claims: The disaster occurred while approaching the Lakehurst mooring mast on May 6, 1937.
Investigations center a hydrogen-air mixture near rear gas cells 4/5 and likely electrical ignition.
The episode frame should connect gas, weather, landing procedure, material risk, and prestige confidence.
cautions: Leak cause and exact spark source remain uncertain.
Do not present paint/coating causation as settled.
next_action: Mike/human source-audit disposition before writer packet.
